bioParagraph1: I am a Full Stack JavaScript Engineer with a backend-first mindset and a passion for building scalable, reliable features using Node.js and React. My experience centers on architecting RESTful APIs and diagnosing complex production issues to ensure system stability and performance.
bioParagraph2: I also have experience streamlining development workflows by creating automated CI/CD pipelines for my projects. I thrive on solving technical challenges and delivering polished, user-focused applications.
